channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Stop burning money in 2026: How to find and cancel your unneeded subscriptions easily
item.description: The new year often brings sticker shock. A glance at our bank statements and credit card bills shows just how much we spent during the holidays, serving as a painful reminder that with the festivities behind us, we should work on getting our expenditures under control.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: A California lawmaker wants to ban AI from children’s toys
item.description: A California lawmaker has introduced a first-in-the-nation bill meant to ban companies from embedding AI chatbot technology into toys designed for children.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: A look at how federal agencies rang in the new year
item.description: With the sky filled with fireworks, the Washington Monument is illuminated as a candle as part of the 250th anniversary celebration for the United States, Thursday, Jan. 1, 2026, in Washington.
item.dc:creator: Amber Corrin, Federal News Network

item.title: How to watch NHL Winter Classic 2026: live stream New York Rangers vs Florida Panthers, TV channels, preview
item.description: Here's how to watch Rangers vs Panthers live streams online in the 2026 NHL Winter Classic, as the traditional New Year's game heads to Florida for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Adam Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: AI’s most important benchmark in 2026? Trust
item.description: In 2026 (and beyond) the best benchmark for large language models won’t be MMLU or AgentBench or GAIA. It will be trust—something AI will have to rebuild before it can be broadly useful and valuable to both consumers and businesses. Researchers identify several different kinds of AI trust.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Apple Fitness+ is kicking off 2026 with new workout programs
item.description: Apple Fitness+ is kicking off 2026 with new workout programs aimed at encouraging users to jump into – or jump back into – yoga, strength, or HIIT.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: Fake AI chat results are spreading dangerous Mac malware
item.description: Mac malware campaign uses fake AI chat results to deliver AMOS through terminal commands, security researchers report. Attackers exploit trust in AI-generated cleanup guides.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 could be lighter than ever
item.description: A new year means new foldables, and we might have learned some more about Samsung's next foldable phones.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Experts warn PC prices could rise even more in 2026 as RAM costs set to soar higher
item.description: PCs and smartphones could become far more expensive from the second half of 2026 due to memory shortages, experts warn.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Chromium explained: How the open-source engine drives today’s browsers
item.description: 3 facts to know about Chromium Chromium provides the core engine, network stack, and architecture for Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and other major web browsers. The project’s code lineage traces back to 2001, forking from Apple’s WebKit.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Deepseek says new method can train AI more efficiently and cheaply
item.description: Chinese AI company Deepseek has unveiled a new training method, Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), which will make it possible to train large language models more efficiently and at lower cost, reports the South China Morning Post.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Las mejores entrevistas a líderes de TI en CIO ESPAÑA en 2025
item.description: Sonia Segade, directora de Transformación Digital y Tecnología de Renfe La apuesta por la inteligencia artificial, la hiperautomatización, el análisis de datos, la ciberseguridad y la convergencia entre las tecnologías de información y de operación son algunas de las palancas de futuro de Renfe, seg
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Space X plans to lower Starlink satellites’ orbital altitude
item.description: Space X plans to lower the orbit of all Starlink satellites in 2026, Reuters reports. According to the private space company’s chief technology officer Michael Nicolls, the orbit of the satellites will be lowered from about 550 to 480 kilometers. The aim is to increase safety in space.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: El ROI de la IA: cómo medir su verdadero valor
item.description: A pesar de todo el revuelo generado por el potencial de la IA para transformar los negocios, muchas organizaciones aún tienen dificultades para determinar hasta qué punto sus implementaciones están dando resultados reales.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia licenses Groq’s inferencing chip tech and hires its leaders
item.description: Nvidia has licensed intellectual property from inferencing chip designer Groq, and hired away some of its senior executives, but stopped short of an outright acquisition.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: More than $32 billion in U.S. clean energy projects were canceled in 2025
item.description: Two years ago, a $575 million battery factory planned in St. Louis, Missouri, was set to be the first large-scale lithium iron phosphate (LFP) facility in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company
